name: Refrigerated Transport Service (RTS)
description: 42 years of hands-on cold-chain transport experience. Reefer specialists, not generalists — decades on Thermo King and Carrier Transicold means the right diagnosis the first time, no parts cannon, no guessing on the customer's dime. Mobile service across KW for when a trailer can't make it to the shop. Multiple bays and parts in stock to keep downtime short.
